topic_text: When Every day of the week at from Date & Time, do Turn lights on using LIFX. Weekday Wake Up Lights. Select the time of the morning and days you want your lights to wake you up

When Every day at from Date & Time, do Send a command using openHAB. Turn on the light every morning at 7am.. Easily setup a daily routine - you can decide which time and you can of course send and command to any openHAB item, so you are not restricted to lights only.

When Every day of the week at from Date & Time, do Blink lights using LIFX. Blink my LIFX lights to wake me up. LIFX has great Schedules built-in to fade in my lights for a gentle wake-upBut sometimes a gradual fade-in is not enough to wake meThis recipe flashes my lights for one whole minute to make sure I've really wokenI just power the light off via the app or wall switch to stop it flashing if I don't need the whole minute of flashes.

When Every day of the week at from Date & Time, do Blink lights using LIFX. Blink Lifx lights at a specific time. My kids don't have a good sense of time (I.e., how much of it has passed), so having a visual indicator is way to let them know that some planned event is about to begin.
